commands.review_summary:
The branch layers three ACP runtime/replay/test fixes on top of the open node-backed ACP runtime branch, including clock-skew lease handling, idempotent projection runner startup, and dynamic-import replay test mocks.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-head correctness finding: source inspection shows a concrete retry path where recordProjectorPreparedSyntheticFinal can fail after earlier effects were checkpointed, leaving a fresh retry coordinator unable to rebuild final TTS. Current main cannot reproduce the PR title directly because the durable replay module is absent there.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer review is needed because this branch is a follow-up on top of https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/48940, has unique commits that should be folded or superseded there, and still has proof, security, and replay correctness blockers.
